identity.what: Autonomous multi-agent paper-trading research engine. Sole purpose: find market edge and PROVE it — deterministically, no LLMs in analyst layers, no synthetic data in the decision path, every judge judged, every claim graded vs fills/fees/benchmarks/time.
identity.stage: ALPHA 0.9 — NOT 1.0. Gated by duel-board observation time (at 2 sessions, needs 5) and the unshipped valuables backfill.

accounts.note: all paper; traditional equities ONLY, enforced at the order choke point
accounts.future: A 2nd live pair (stocks + valuables) someday, via account-number swap — ONLY after edge is proven. Valuables are a separate-but-equal jurisdiction already (GOLDSMITH agent + valuables organs).

laws.law: every judge gets judged; judgement feeds elections + breeding
no LLMs in analyst layers; no synthetic data in the decision path
fees are real and tracked on every trade
prove everything: py_compile + synthetic + real-data + node-check + runtime smoke
real money only after proof, only losable — operator's vow on record
walk-away bar: four clean unattended weeks

autonomy_guarantees.item: cycles: cron-job.org 24/7 q20min + GitHub cron backup
fetch discipline + budgets: domain clocks (news never sleeps)
news coverage: rotation over full 500+ universe; holdings every cycle
IPO watch: debut_rotation auto-advances 5-session→next; calendar self-fills; 6-phase + sympathy symbols
evolution: weekly breeding from equity-edge fitness; genomes; shadow; senate; cap 30
judgement: report card, source leaderboard, vs-market (self-judging), fees truth, harvest fill-truth, wantgot v2 — all append-only
metadata: regime axes(4) + narrative lifecycle + catalyst taxonomy + benchmark log + per-trade alpha — daily, permanent
Dr. Strange: 1000-path shadow oracle every cycle; silent until names accrue ~5 sessions; visible on dashboard + overlays stock cards; never goes "live" (permanent counterfactual bench)

gap.note: NOT PROVEN; books trail principal; vs-market judge day 2. Unresolved, not failed. Only time closes it.
axes live but log_days=2; vol/breadth UNKNOWN until ~50 sessions
top regret; valuables clocks thin until free historical OHLC seeded
graph polish to Binance/Yahoo; version string still 0.007; duel panel; edge-tab gold
PAT rotation, branch protection, pinned SHAs, Dependabot

known_state.compaction_note: do NOT re-run compact_history same day — backup tag collision (harmless error)

silmaril_bootstrap.return_path: F backfill → D capital queue → G IPO cards → cosmetics → hardening → observe to duel day-5 → TAG v1.0-alpha. Nothing else owed.
silmaril_bootstrap.closing: The engine is real and awake. It will keep cycling, learning, breeding, judging, and telling the truth whether or not anyone watches. The edge is still a question — which is the most honest thing it can report. Find it. Prove it.
